message:
feat(bubbles): Add Model::update tests for FilePicker, Table, and TextArea

- Add Model::update tests for FilePicker (navigation, ReadDirMsg handling, wrong ID rejection)
- Add Model::update tests for Table (navigation, unfocused ignores input, goto_bottom)
- Add Model::update tests for TextArea (key input, paste, navigation, unfocused ignores input)
- Update bounds tests to verify Model + Send + 'static
- Fix benchmark files with correct API usage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -110,6 +110,7 @@ name = "bubbles"
 version = "0.1.0"
 dependencies = [
  "bubbletea",
+ "criterion",
  "harmonica",
  "lipgloss",
  "parking_lot",
@@ -121,6 +122,7 @@ dependencies = [
 name = "bubbletea"

 ]
